Regal_Bunnicorn.name: Regal Bunnicorn
Regal_Bunnicorn.oracle_text: Regal Bunnicorn's power and toughness are each equal to the number of nonland permanents you control.

Warren_Warleader.name: Warren Warleader
Warren_Warleader.oracle_text:
Offspring {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell. If you do, when this creature enters, create a 1/1 token copy of it.)
Whenever you attack, choose one —
• Create a 1/1 white Rabbit creature token that's tapped and attacking.
• Attacking creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

Devilish_Valet.name: Devilish Valet
Devilish_Valet.oracle_text:
Trample, haste
Alliance — Whenever another creature you control enters, double this creature's power until end of turn.

Tender_Wildguide.name: Tender Wildguide
Tender_Wildguide.oracle_text:
Offspring {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell. If you do, when this creature enters, create a 1/1 token copy of it.)
{T}: Add one mana of any color.
{T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

Command_Tower.name: Command Tower
Command_Tower.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

Champion_Of_Lambholt.name: Champion of Lambholt
Champion_Of_Lambholt.oracle_text:
Creatures with power less than this creature's power can't block creatures you control.
Whenever another creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

Jetmir.name: Jetmir, Nexus of Revels
Jetmir.oracle_text:
Creatures you control get +1/+0 and have vigilance as long as you control three or more creatures.
Creatures you control also get +1/+0 and have trample as long as you control six or more creatures.
Creatures you control also get +1/+0 and have double strike as long as you control nine or more creatures.

Court_of_Embereth.name: Court of Embereth
Court_of_Embereth.oracle_text:
When this enchantment enters, you become the monarch.
At the beginning of your upkeep, create a 3/1 red Knight creature token. Then if you're the monarch, this enchantment deals X damage to each opponent, where X is the number of creatures you control.
